text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
One day, with the spring Tenno Sho<n>drawing close,
Biwa Hayahide shows<n>up looking especially
exhausted.

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
Narita Brian, her sister, has recently<n>won the
Satsuki Sho and set a new<n>track record.

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
And the remarkable feat has dealt a<n>spectacular
blow to Biwa Hayahide,<n>casting a shadow of
doubt over her<n>mind.

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
Narita Taishin confesses to Biwa<n>Hayahide that
she's always thought<n>of her as a "real pain in the
butt."

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
Though her attempt to bring comfort is<n>awkward at
best, it's Narita Taishin's<n>best effort to encourage
her friend<n>and rival.
